services.name: Hospital of the University of Pennsylvania (Penn Medicine)
services.notes: Top-ranked academic medical center, Level 1 trauma, comprehensive emergency and specialty services

services.name: Rite Aid - Rittenhouse Square
services.notes: Central location pharmacy, extended hours, vaccinations

services.name: Whole Foods Market - Center City
services.notes: Full organic and natural foods market, prepared foods, central location

services.name: Trader Joe's - Center City
services.notes: Popular grocery with affordable specialty items, small format, always busy

services.name: PNC Bank - Rittenhouse Square
services.notes: Full-service branch, ATM, financial advisors, headquarters city

services.name: Penn Medicine Primary Care Rittenhouse
services.notes: Penn Medicine-affiliated primary care, accepting new patients, MyPennMedicine portal

services.name: Philadelphia Dentistry - Center City
services.notes: General and cosmetic dentistry, modern facility, same-day appointments

services.name: Penn Vet Ryan Hospital
services.notes: University of Pennsylvania veterinary hospital, specialty and emergency care, 24/7

services.name: Schuylkill River Dog Park
services.address: Schuylkill River Trail at Locust Street, Philadelphia, PA 19103
services.notes: Fenced riverside off-leash dog park, separate small/large dog areas

services.name: City Fitness - Rittenhouse
services.notes: Modern gym, rooftop pool, group classes, 24/7 access with membership

services.name: Christ Church Philadelphia
services.notes: Historic church (1695), where Washington and Franklin worshipped, active parish

services.name: Philadelphia International Airport (PHL)
services.notes: Major international airport, American Airlines hub, SEPTA Regional Rail to Center City

services.name: 30th Street Station (Amtrak/SEPTA)
services.notes: Major Amtrak hub, Northeast Corridor to NYC (1.5 hrs) and DC (2 hrs), SEPTA Regional Rail

services.name: Industrious Philadelphia - Rittenhouse
services.notes: Premium coworking, day passes, private offices, conference rooms, community events

attractions.name: Philadelphia Museum of Art
attractions.description: World-class art museum with 240,000+ works, famous Rocky steps, Impressionist galleries

attractions.name: Reading Terminal Market
attractions.description: Historic indoor market since 1893, Amish vendors, diverse food stalls, local artisan goods

attractions.name: Independence Hall
attractions.description: Birthplace of the Declaration of Independence and US Constitution, UNESCO World Heritage Site
attractions.frequency: Daily, timed entry tickets required (free), ranger-guided tours

attractions.name: Rittenhouse Square
attractions.description: Elegant public park surrounded by cafés, galleries, and upscale shops, heart of Center City

attractions.name: Fairmount Park (Wissahickon Valley)
attractions.description: One of the largest urban parks in the US, 57 miles of trails, Wissahickon gorge, Forbidden Drive

attractions.name: The Kimmel Center for the Performing Arts
attractions.description: Home of the Philadelphia Orchestra, jazz, theater, and dance performances

attractions.name: The Barnes Foundation
attractions.description: Extraordinary collection of Impressionist, Post-Impressionist, and early Modern art

attractions.name: Spruce Street Harbor Park
attractions.description: Seasonal waterfront park with hammocks, floating gardens, food vendors, and light installations

attractions.name: Eastern State Penitentiary
attractions.description: Haunting ruins of the world's first modern penitentiary, Al Capone's cell, audio tour by Steve Buscemi
attractions.frequency: Daily 10:00-17:00, Terror Behind the Walls in fall
